famous quote:
"Experience: that most brutal of teachers. But you learn, my God do you learn."
-- C.S. Lewis
Interview Text:
Will: 

(part 2)

At one point he and his wife decided to make a life map. This means they set goals and benchmarks regarding money and kids and other significiant moments.

One night it came to him to draw out this map, as if it were a real land map. He had played video games and read Fantasy books that dealt with maps so he was familiar with this. He started to write words, but then he remembered the vision and thought, well, the first thing we need is the armor of God. So he put an armory on the map.

From there on God continued to show him images for the map. He had to be careful not to let his imagination creep in but instead listen to what he believed was coming from God. He worked his way up the page. Somewhere along the line his wife fell asleep and he finished off the map. By the time he was done he had ten images, ending in an image of a shore. His wife never got to see the image of the shore.

But the next day as she was driving around the town she heard from God "Go to Papua New Guinea." She was like, "What?!" They had talked about moving to the beach in Florida some day but Papua New Guinea?!

When she got home she told Will what she had heard and he told her about the rest of the map, including the shore. They looked it up and it turns out Papua New Guinea is full of shorelines like the one he drew.
Music Video Instructions: Listen to this as God telling you how much he loves you, and you him.
Music Video Description: I can't help falling in love- Haley Reinhardt
